readme_first_100_lines_summary: AgilePlus is a local-first, AI-native, spec-driven PM platform for agent+human teams. It uses a Cargo workspace with hexagonal (ports-and-adapters) architecture: agileplus-domain and agileplus-application have no framework deps; everything else is an adapter. Features include HTTP API, gRPC (tonic), CLI, Askama+React/TS web dashboard, Electrobun desktop app, SQLite/NATS persistence, GitHub/Plane sync, P2P merge, governance/release channels. Branching: main protected, prefixes feat/fix/chore/ci/docs. Quality: clippy -D warnings, cargo fmt, cargo-deny, weekly cargo-audit. Files UTF-8 no BOM. Active work state at 70% with CI partially red; one of three Phenotype PM frontend candidates alongside Tracera and Planify.
